message:
feat(core): auto-tuning config + fix Cancelled/Panicked error handling (wa-ssm4)

Add auto_tune.rs: proportional control loop for adaptive configuration
parameters (poll_interval, scrollback_lines, snapshot_interval, pool_size,
backpressure_threshold) with hysteresis, pinned params, and safety ranges.
23 tests (19 unit + 4 proptest) passing.

Fix non-exhaustive pattern matches in error_renderer.rs and retry.rs for
new Error::Cancelled and Error::Panicked variants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 3df387d8f89fd38f0094c43e5098e126d4e2c60c5a37ecda1bf0873f97453ee5 # shrinks to rss = 0.0, latency = 9.289741172740648, cpu = 0.44364171271834313
